overview: Premium animated 3D school website for Cutie Pie Kids Pre School — a vibrant, fully responsive showcase with glassmorphism design, floating 3D educational elements, program cards with flip effects, parent testimonials, gallery, FAQ, and enrollment form.
features: Animated 3D hero with floating shapes (stars, books, ABC letters, pencils)
Glassmorphism program cards with 3D flip hover effect
Photo gallery with lightbox and hover zoom
Enrollment & contact form with backend storage
Premium Google Fonts: Nunito & Fredoka One
Vibrant color palette: purples, yellows, pinks, teals, coral
